titles.title: You Are the Center of My Life

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v4 v6 v7 v8 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let my walk speak loud And my words be true Let my life be whole and my eyes on You Lord I'm stepping out, from the comfort zone Letting go of me, holding on to You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Freedom comes, when I call You Lord You are Lord, my God

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are the Centre of it all The universe declares in awe Your Majesty, I surrender all I make You the Centre of my life Lord I respond with all I am You placed in me the song Of Heaven's melody Your Majesty, I live to sing Your song

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I have found Your peace It replaces any fear You have done it all, I can trust in You Lord I'm stepping out, from the comfort zone Letting go of me, holding on to You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: This is Your song, not mine It is Your song, that brings healing to this land This is Your song, not mine It is Your song, that brings freedom (2x)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Freedom comes, when I call You Lord Freedom comes, when I call You Lord

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Your Majesty, I live to sing Your song Your Majesty, I live to sing Your song Your Majesty, my life will sing Your song
